summary: Tested per-attribute product scoping feature in Bulk Category Editor. All 10 test cases passed. The feature allows individual category/filter/spec attributes to be scoped to specific products within a bulk selection.

issues:
Minor React warning: '
cannot be a descendant of

' - Badge component nested inside paragraph element (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments:
Minor HTML nesting issue: Badge component (renders as div) is nested inside a

element in BulkCategoryEditorSections.jsx around line 892-896. Should use instead of

for the parent element.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Per-attribute scoping feature is fully functional. Key components: (1) ScopeableBadge renders scope icon next to selected attributes, (2) AttributeScopePopover shows product checklist when scope icon clicked, (3) perAttributeScopes state stores Set of product keys per attribute, (4) Scope summary banner shows count of scoped attributes with 'Clear all scopes' button, (5) Section-level scope (SectionProductScope) also works for applying all section attributes to subset of products.

verified_working.test_1_login: SUCCESS - Logged in with qasim@tilestation.co.uk / admin123
verified_working.test_3_product_selection: SUCCESS - Can select products via checkboxes
verified_working.test_5_categories_help_text: SUCCESS - Shows 'Click attribute scope icon to assign per-product'
verified_working.test_6_category_button_click: SUCCESS - Outdoor Tiles button selects and shows scope icon
verified_working.test_7_scope_icon_appears: SUCCESS - Users icon (scope button) appears next to selected category with data-testid='attr-scope-btn-cat_outdoor-tiles'
verified_working.test_8_scope_popover: SUCCESS - Popover opens with product list, title 'Scope: Outdoor Tiles', search box, and checkboxes
verified_working.test_9_product_selection_in_popover: SUCCESS - Can select products, footer shows '3 of 15 products will get Outdoor Tiles'
verified_working.test_10_scope_count_badge: SUCCESS - Scope button shows count '3' after selecting products
verified_working.test_11_scope_summary_banner: SUCCESS - Banner shows '1 attribute scoped to specific products' with 'Clear all scopes' button
verified_working.test_12_section_level_scope: SUCCESS - Section scope toggle expands to show 15 products with checkboxes

per_attribute_scoping_flow: 1. Select products in supplier products table
2. Click 'Edit Categories' to open Bulk Category Editor modal
3. Click a category button (e.g., 'Outdoor Tiles') to select it
4. Scope icon (Users icon) appears next to the selected button
5. Click scope icon to open popover with product checklist
6. Check specific products to scope the attribute to them
7. Popover footer shows count: 'X of Y products will get [attribute]'
8. Close popover - scope button shows count badge
9. Scope summary banner appears at top showing scoped attribute count
10. 'Clear all scopes' button allows resetting all scopes
11. On save, only scoped products receive the attribute
